_meta.leakage: legal form + date known before the vote; no post-vote inputs
_meta.note: 3rd real institution category (beyond Congress + court); includes a NON-VOTING timing/cadence dimension and an out-of-sample predictive dimension

optional_referendum.constitutional_basis: Art. 141 — federal laws challenged by petition: People

popular_initiative.constitutional_basis: Art. 139 — citizen constitutional initiative: People + Cantons

counter_proposal.constitutional_basis: direct counter-proposal to an initiative: People + Cantons

institutional_signal.fact: popular initiatives (double majority + establishment opposition) pass ~10%; mandatory referenda ~75% — the legal FORM is strongly outcome-structuring

timing_dimension_non_voting.note: the fixed quarterly voting-Sunday cadence — a non-voting institutional scheduling rule

replay.limitation: cached file lacks per-canton vote shares → the double majority is reconstructed as an outcome REGULARITY by legal form, NOT executed on canton counts (full execution replay needs canton-level Swissvotes data; preserved as remaining work).
